description.value:
Receive Medication data MTD building blocks for patient G. XXX_Hemsbergen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_medicatiegegevens_ontvangen_MTD
Original description: TEST Medicatiegegevens MTD Scenarioset 6
Receive Medication data MTD resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where(category.coding.code = '18629005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2554771') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '94692') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '134538') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationAdministration).where(category.coding.code = '18629005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1013602') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '228427') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '196738') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2554771|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (MORFINE HCL 3WATER INFVLST 5MG/ML CASS 100ML AHZ)
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1013602|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (DEPONIT T 5 PLEISTER TRANSDERMAAL 18,7MG)
